purpose: Prospectively test whether corporate-action source differences create operationally material cash, unit, weight-tracking, or hypothetical rebalance-order differences without opening validation returns or testing strategy edge.
owner_authorization: The owner said to continue with the separately hash-locked E0 prospective shadow-accounting preregistration on 2026-07-20.
research_question: During a locked forward-only E0 dry run, do Alpha Vantage or Lily's Yahoo-event accounting differ materially from the Webull paper ledger for corporate actions affecting the ten-ETF shadow portfolio?

scope.broker_reference: Webull Thailand paper-account event, cash, and unit ledger; production holdings or real-money transactions are forbidden.
scope.out_of_scope_event_rule: Record any other event type in the coverage inventory, exclude it from the primary comparison, and retain a scope blocker; never silently coerce it into an included type.

comparison_streams.inputs: Auditable paper-account corporate-action, cash, unit, and posting records exported or read after a separately authorized activation.
comparison_streams.required_capability: The paper environment must expose event, cash, unit, and timestamp evidence that can be hashed and reconciled without exposing account identifiers.
comparison_streams.substitution_rule: If Webull Thailand cannot provide an auditable paper ledger, stop before observation and report activation_blocked; do not substitute a production or real-money account.

comparison_streams.inputs: Forward snapshots from the Alpha Vantage DIVIDENDS and SPLITS endpoints acquired only after separate activation, normalized and applied to the common opening ledger.
comparison_streams.provenance_limit: This is a current snapshot, not a point-in-time revision archive or historical ground truth.
comparison_streams.selection_rule: No provider field may be selected or discarded according to the resulting weight, order, return, or PnL impact.

comparison_streams.inputs: Forward Yahoo chart events explicitly labeled dividend, capital gain, or split, applied by Lily's deterministic ledger to the common opening cash and units; adjusted close alone is forbidden.
comparison_streams.portfolio_rule: Use the frozen L-0 ten-sleeve target weights and prospective quotes only; do not calculate a trend signal or load a pre-activation price history.
comparison_streams.revision_rule: Every later provider revision is a new immutable observation linked to the earlier container; never overwrite the first-seen record.

common_shadow_portfolio.initialization_rule: At activation, establish identical opening cash and fractional units in all three streams from the paper ledger and one common forward-only quote snapshot. Record the broker fractional quantum before any event observation.
common_shadow_portfolio.price_rule: Use one shared forward-only end-of-session USD quote per symbol for all stream comparisons; never use a pre-activation quote or a validation-window price.
common_shadow_portfolio.accounting_precision_rule: Retain source precision and at least eight decimal places internally. Apply no discretionary rounding; the broker fractional quantum is used only in the locked unit materiality formula.
common_shadow_portfolio.weight_tracking_delta_definition: For each stream and symbol, post-event market value divided by stream NAV minus the frozen target weight.
common_shadow_portfolio.hypothetical_rebalance_definition: Target notional under the frozen weight minus post-event stream notional, calculated with the common quote; record only the difference between streams and never transmit an order.

event_record_contract.event_match_key: symbol plus normalized event_type plus effective_or_ex_date; use the provider or broker event identifier as corroboration when available, never as the sole key.
event_record_contract.missing_field_rule: Preserve null with a named reason for dates or identifiers documented as unavailable. Cash, units, source timestamp, source container hash, reference NAV, and reference quote hash may not be imputed.
event_record_contract.container_rule: Store immutable redacted source containers and normalized rows with separate SHA-256 values; revisions append new observations.

materiality_thresholds.reference_nav_definition: Webull paper-account NAV at the prior US session close before the event, or the locked USD 1,000 opening NAV before the first close; the chosen value is shared by all streams for that event.
materiality_thresholds.cash_balance_difference_usd: absolute pairwise stream difference greater than max(USD 1.00, 0.0005 times reference NAV)
materiality_thresholds.unit_balance_difference: absolute pairwise stream difference greater than max(0.0001 share, the broker-reported minimum fractional share quantum recorded before observation)
materiality_thresholds.target_weight_tracking_difference: absolute pairwise difference greater than 0.0010, equal to 10 basis points of NAV
materiality_thresholds.hypothetical_order_notional_difference_u: absolute pairwise difference greater than max(USD 1.00, 0.0010 times reference NAV)
materiality_thresholds.event_detection_or_posting_delay: Either Alpha Vantage shadow accounting or Lily strategy accounting first sees or posts the matched event more than two US trading sessions after the Webull paper ledger posting timestamp
materiality_thresholds.strict_comparison_rule: A value equal to a threshold is non-material; only a strictly greater value breaches.
materiality_thresholds.unknown_broker_precision_rule: If the broker fractional quantum is not documented before the first event observation, activation is blocked and the threshold may not be chosen after seeing an event.

breach_and_decision_rules.event_level_breach: An event is materially discrepant if any pairwise comparison breaches any one locked materiality dimension.
breach_and_decision_rules.aggregate_breach: One or more event-level breaches produces material_operational_discrepancy_observed and reopens the point-in-time source program under B4.5.
breach_and_decision_rules.no_netting_rule: Never net opposite cash, unit, weight, order, or delay discrepancies across streams, symbols, events, or dates.
breach_and_decision_rules.multiple_dimensions_rule: Report every breached dimension even when one breach already determines the aggregate outcome.
breach_and_decision_rules.sufficient_evidence_rule: Complete only after at least 180 calendar days and at least three matched relevant events across at least two symbols, or at the 365-day hard stop.
breach_and_decision_rules.insufficient_evidence_rule: At the 365-day hard stop, if the event or symbol minimum is not reached, report insufficient_operational_evidence; do not extend automatically and do not infer that discrepancies are small.
breach_and_decision_rules.no_breach_outcome: If evidence is sufficient and no event breaches, report no_material_operational_discrepancy_observed_within_preregistered_scope only.
breach_and_decision_rules.breach_outcome: If any event breaches, report material_operational_discrepancy_observed, retain all raw evidence, stop any automatic operational promotion, and reopen source investigation.
breach_and_decision_rules.unreconciled_event_rule: A broker event lacking either provider match by the end of the two-session delay threshold is a delay breach; a provider event lacking a broker match remains an explicit unmatched-event blocker and may not be treated as zero.

activation_prerequisites: A separate owner-approved activation order is committed after this gate.
The Webull Thailand paper environment, not production or real money, exposes an auditable event, cash, unit, and timestamp ledger.
The broker minimum fractional share quantum is documented and committed before observation.
The dry-run implementation, report validator, hermetic fixtures, credential-redaction checks, and immutable-container checks pass before activation.
The exact activation timestamp, 365-day stop timestamp, opening redacted ledger hashes, common quote hashes, and zero-order attestation are committed before the first eligible event is inspected.
Prospective provider acquisition limits, request budgets, and cost guard are separately locked; no provider request is authorized by B4.7.
The 2016-01-04 through 2026-06-30 validation-return window remains sealed and no pre-activation return, signal, position, regime, benchmark, or PnL is loaded.
stop_conditions: Paper ledger capability is absent, unauditable, or requires a production or real-money position.
Broker fractional quantum is unknown when activation would begin.
Any credential, account identifier, balance, or position value would be persisted without the locked redaction and hashing contract.
Any code path requests validation prices or returns, calculates a trend signal, or computes strategy PnL.
Any preview, paper order, or other broker action is attempted before a separate activation order authorizes its exact endpoint and environment.
A paid data action is required without a separate cost-gate decision.
An event-level material breach is confirmed; collection may continue only for incident reconciliation, not promotion.
claim_limits: The Webull paper ledger is an operational reference, not research ground truth.
Prospective observations cannot prove that historical provider discrepancies were immaterial or correct historical returns.
No outcome establishes strategy edge, E2 validation, historical-return correctness, broker execution quality, deployment readiness, or real-money suitability.
Too few events means insufficient operational evidence, not absence of a discrepancy.
A clean result applies only to the symbols, event types, streams, dates, thresholds, and operational setup preregistered here.
required_future_outputs: immutable redacted source containers and dual hashes
machine JSON and matching Thai research log after completion or stop
zero-order or separately authorized paper-order endpoint attestation
producing git commit and gate hashes
explicit E0 and edge_claim none labels
next_safe_action: Implement and lock a separate B4.8 activation contract with hermetic fixtures and report validation; do not call Webull or providers, observe an event, preview an order, or begin paper trading under B4.7.

source_lineage.use: B4.5 owner decision, required streams, dimensions, claim limits, and source-search reopen rule.
B4.6 verifies production read-only and ten-symbol fractional metadata but does not authorize paper trading.
Frozen USD 1,000 ten-sleeve target weights, 90% gross exposure, and 10% cash.
E0 operational dry runs carry no edge claim and do not promote L-1.
Separate paper-trade decisions from deployment and define written stop conditions before execution.
